title: Midday schema_manifest.json (format 1)
description: The validate-before-write source, generated from engine_api.json by the codegen chain (api/CODEGEN.md): the reflected value-type table (mirroring reflect::TypeDesc::accepts JSON shapes), event payload schemas, and expression function signatures. Per-format validation schemas (scene/machine) append under `formats` at m1-scene-format. Validated by scripts/validate_envelope.py (dependency-free keyword subset).

format_version.description: Manifest shape version; bumped only with a documented migration (spec section 8 versioning policy).

api_compat_hash.description: The api_compat_hash of the engine_api.json this manifest derives from.

value_types.description: The fixed TypeDesc spelling table, TypeKind declaration order.

events.description: Event payload schemas (docs stripped), engine_api.json order.

expr_functions.description: Expression function signatures as positional type spellings.

formats.description: Per-format validation schemas; empty until m1-scene-format appends scene/machine entries.

json.description: The JSON wire shape reflect::TypeDesc::accepts enforces for this spelling.

size.description: Tuple arity; present iff json is number_tuple.
